symbols.name: TestFileIDAllocator
subtests: sequential allocation is strictly increasing from 1
concurrent allocation yields unique IDs, no duplicates

high_water_mark_persistence.location: <catalog-path>.idalloc (e.g. .meta/catalog.dat.idalloc), sibling to the main catalog data file, derived via fm.file.Name() + idAllocSuffix
high_water_mark_persistence.durability: WriteAt(offset 0) + Sync on every Next() call, before the new value is returned to the caller

acceptance_criteria_status.no_reuse_after_delete: met (allocator never decrements/recycles; deletion is out of scope for this narrow allocator and is a 1.1.5 CRUD concern)
acceptance_criteria_status.durable_across_reopen: met (sidecar file WriteAt+Sync per call, restored in NewIDAllocator)

pointers.self_consistency_results: .cdr/runs/2026-07-03/011-implementation/self-consistency.json (all PASS: go build ./engine/..., go test -run TestFileIDAllocator -race -v, full go test ./engine/catalog/... -race -v)
